checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement definition of 'Consolidated Total Net Debt' and 'Consolidated EBITDA' (LTM), including any add-backs or exclusions.
checks.ratio_formula_hint: (Total Debt - Cash & Cash Equivalents) / EBITDA (Last Twelve Months)
data_needed: Total Debt (current and long-term) as of Q4-2025
Cash and Cash Equivalents as of Q4-2025
EBITDA for each of the four quarters: Q1-2025, Q2-2025, Q3-2025, Q4-2025

checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement definition of 'Consolidated Total Net Debt' to confirm whether restricted cash or other adjustments apply.
checks.ratio_formula_hint: Same as above, but verify if any debt is excluded or cash is netted differently.
data_needed: Restricted cash balance as of Q4-2025
Any debt instruments with covenant-lite or excluded status

checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement definition of 'Consolidated EBITDA' to confirm LTM calculation and any pro-forma adjustments for acquisitions or dispositions.
checks.ratio_formula_hint: Sum of trailing four quarters' EBITDA, adjusted per agreement.
data_needed: EBITDA for Q1-2025, Q2-2025, Q3-2025, Q4-2025 (from financial statements)
Details of any material acquisitions or divestitures in the LTM period

checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement cure provisions or equity cure rights that may adjust EBITDA or debt.
checks.ratio_formula_hint: N/A - check for cure notices or equity injections.
data_needed: Any cure notices filed by borrower
Equity injection amounts and dates in Q4-2025

checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement testing frequency and grace period details.
checks.ratio_formula_hint: N/A - confirm compliance date and any cure period.
data_needed: Date of Q4-2025 financial statement delivery
Cure period end date per agreement
